frames.name: Platform Enforcement Frame
frames.description: Focuses on Kalshi as a responsible platform taking action against rule violations, emphasizing their surveillance systems and enforcement mechanisms
frames.emphasis: Kalshi's detection capabilities, investigation process, and disciplinary actions as evidence of platform self-regulation

frames.name: Insider Trading Violation Frame
frames.description: Presents the story as a straightforward case of policy violations and rule-breaking in prediction markets
frames.emphasis: The specific violations, fines imposed, and suspension periods as enforcement of existing rules

frames.name: Market Integrity Concerns Frame
frames.description: Contextualizes the incident within broader concerns about prediction market manipulation and the challenges of ensuring fair trading
frames.emphasis: Growing concerns about insider trading in prediction markets, regulatory attention, and the difficulty of monitoring vast markets

frames.name: Corporate Response Frame
frames.description: Highlights MrBeast's company response and their existing policies regarding employee participation in prediction markets
frames.emphasis: Beast Industries' zero-tolerance policy, internal investigation, and extension of rules to contestants on their Amazon show

outlierPerspectives: Beast Industries' call for greater transparency from Kalshi in sharing investigation findings for future prevention
The specific mention of contestants on MrBeast's Amazon Prime show 'Beast Games' being prohibited from related betting
Kalshi's decision to donate the fine to a consumer education nonprofit
missingContext: Details about what specific markets or bets Kaptur placed that triggered the investigation
Information about MrBeast's (Jimmy Donaldson's) personal response or knowledge of the situation
Comparison to traditional securities insider trading penalties and how prediction market violations are typically handled
Details about Kalshi's surveillance systems and how they detected the 'statistically anomalous' trading patterns
Information about the other 200+ investigations Kalshi mentioned conducting
Context about the regulatory status of prediction markets and oversight mechanisms beyond platform self-regulation
